description.ko: 유기적 생명과 디지털 기술의 접점을 탐구하는 시각적 여정으로, 복잡한 알고리즘과 빛을 통해 가상 공간에서 번성하는 합성 식물군을 묘사합니다.
description.en: A visionary exploration of the intersection between organic life and digital technology, where synthetic flora thrives in a virtual landscape through complex algorithms and light.

prompt: A high-resolution cinematic shot of a bioluminescent forest where plants are made of fiber optics and glowing circuitry. Shimmering digital pollen floating in the air, deep teal and neon violet color palette, hyper-realistic textures, 8k resolution, ethereal lighting, intricate data-stream patterns on translucent leaves.
